recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Dear Zachary: A Letter to a Son About His Father
recommendations.overview: In 2001, Andrew Bagby, a medical resident, is murdered not long after breaking up with his girlfriend. Soon after, when she announces she's pregnant, one of Andrew's many close friends, Kurt Kuenne, begins this film, a gift to the child.

recommendations.title: Buy Now! The Shopping Conspiracy
recommendations.overview: This subversive documentary unpacks the tricks brands use to keep their customers consuming — and the real impact they have on our lives and the world.

recommendations.title: David Attenborough: A Life on Our Planet
recommendations.overview: The story of life on our planet by the man who has seen more of the natural world than any other. In more than 90 years, Attenborough has visited every continent on the globe, exploring the wild places of our planet and documenting the living world i
recommendations.director: Jonathan Hughes, Alastair Fothergill, Keith Scholey

recommendations.title: Dior and I
recommendations.overview: Behind-the-scenes documentary revealing what goes on inside the colourful, privileged, and sometimes stressful Christian Dior fashion house.

recommendations.title: Best Worst Movie
recommendations.overview: A look at the making of the film Troll 2 (1990) and its journey from being crowned the "worst film of all time" to a cherished cult classic.

recommendations.title: Casting JonBenet
recommendations.overview: Twenty years after the modern world's most notorious child murder, the legacy of the crime and its impact are explored.

recommendations.title: Electric Boogaloo: The Wild, Untold Story of Cannon Films
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the rise and fall of the Cannon Film Group, the legendary independent film company helmed by Israeli cousins Menahem Golan and Yoram Globus.

recommendations.title: Spielberg
recommendations.overview: A documentary on the life and career of one of the most influential film directors of all time, Steven Spielberg.

recommendations.title: The Act of Killing
recommendations.overview: In this chilling and groundbreaking documentary, former Indonesian death squad leaders reenact their real-life mass killings in the style of various film genres. As they recreate their past atrocities, the line between reality and performance blurs,
